title: H&E and Immunohistochemistry (IHC) Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2diq3","text":"H\u0026E and Immunohistochemistry (IHC) Staining for MTS and BRC tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"wcmcg","text":"- MWC-chips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uh98y","text":"- PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bexd6","text":"- HACS technology","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4d1q0","text":"- Centrifuge","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wvhyi","text":"- Agar","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"g3cyo","text":"- Paraformaldehyde","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0lhht","text":"- Ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tnc8l","text":"- Citrate Unmasking Solution (Beyotime)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"47dd5","text":"- Antibodies against ER, PR, HER2, Ki-67 (Proteintech)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vzegs","text":"- BSA solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lnwmw","text":"- Diaminobenzidine (DAB) (Solarbio)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xzqfs","text":"- NanoZoomer S210 microscope (Visiopharm, Denmark)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash MTSs from MWC-chips with PBS and sort using HACS technology.
Collect MTSs through centrifugation at 1,200 rpm and 4 °C for 10 minutes.
Wash with cold PBS and embed MTSs in agar.
Fix agar-embedded MTSs and primary tumor tissues overnight in PBS with 4% paraformaldehyde.
Perform paraffin-embedding, sectioning, and H&E staining.
Dewax and rehydrate paraffin-embedded MTSs or BRC tissue sections through a graded ethanol series.
Perform heat-mediated antigen retrieval with Citrate Unmasking Solution.
Block sections at room temperature for 1 hour.
Perform IHC staining overnight at 4 °C with antibodies against ER, PR, HER2, Ki-67.
Dilute antibodies in a ratio of 1:200 in 3% BSA solution.
Use DAB to achieve optimal staining intensity.
Visualize stained tissues using the NanoZoomer S210 microscope.
creator: Guangli Suo
